creator: andrew@cream.org
text:
Edinburgh University have a really good online reference for new UNIX
users, I thought it might be good to add to the bibliography.

Please check the Docbook before you commit - I don't do this stuff as
often as I would like.

Thanks!

>         <para><ulink url="http://www.ed.ac.uk/">Edinburgh University</ulink>
>              has written an <ulink url="http://unixhelp.ed.ac.uk">Online Guide
>              </ulink> for newcomers to the UNIX environment.</para>
>       </listitem>
